    B

    Bishop - Class in pieces
    Represents a Bishop chess piece.
    Bishop(Color) - Constructor for class pieces.Bishop
    Constructs a new Bishop with the specified color.
    BISHOP - Enum constant in enum class pieces.PieceType
    The Bishop piece.
    BLACK - Enum constant in enum class pieces.Color
    Black pieces.
    board - package board
     
    Board - Class in board
    Represents the chess board and manages piece positions and movements.
    Board() - Constructor for class board.Board
    Constructs a new empty Board.

    C

    col - Variable in class utils.Position
     
    Color - Enum Class in pieces
     
    ConsoleInterface - Class in utils
    Handles the console-based user interface for the chess game.

    D

    display() - Method in class board.Board
    Prints the current board state to the console.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class utils.Position
     

    G

    get(int, int) - Method in class board.Board
    Returns the piece at the specified row and column.
    getCaptured() - Method in class board.Board
    Returns the list of captured pieces.
    getColor() - Method in class pieces.Piece
    Returns the color of this piece.
    getPiece(Position) - Method in class board.Board
    Returns the piece at the specified position.
    getType() - Method in class pieces.Piece
    Returns the type of this piece.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class utils.Position
     

    I

    initStandardSetup() - Method in class board.Board
    Initializes the board with pieces in their standard starting positions.
    isCheck(Color) - Method in class board.Board
    Checks if the king of the specified color is in check.
    isCheckmate(Color) - Method in class board.Board
    Checks if the king of the specified color is in checkmate.
    isPathClear(Position, Position) - Method in class board.Board
    Checks if the path between two positions is clear of pieces.
    isValid(int, int) - Static method in class utils.Position
    Checks if the given row and column are within the board bounds.

    M

    Position - Class in utils
    Represents a position on the chess board.
